title: Dry Bulk Demand - Tonne Days
summary:
Main
Dry Weekly Market Monitor - Week 45.2024 Snapshot of Spot Freight Rates, Supply-Demand Trends, Port Congestions November 07, 2024

Chart of the Week: Dry Bulk Demand - Tonne Days
This week's highlight focuses on the growing demand in tonne-days for specific dry cargo types across different vessel sizes, offering insights into recent freight market trends and identifying areas where strong demand for certain cargoes could potentially support freight rates. Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-11-08 102922.png | assets/2024-11-08_dry-bulk-demand-tonne-days_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_a1a7e12e2e9c.png
November brought a significant downturn in dry bulk freight rates, with the Baltic Capesize Index plummeting by 40% on a monthly level. The Baltic Panamax Index also showed a decline, though at a slower pace of 14%.
